sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الرَّكَّابُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Putnici su stigli na aerodrom rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The passengers arrived at the airport early in the morning.

sentences.translation: Stavili su torbe na vagu i čekali.
sentences.translationEn: They placed their bags on the scale and waited.

sentences.arabic: دَخَلُوا إِلَى الطَّائِرَةِ وَجَلَسُوا فِي أَمَاكِنِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ušli su u avion i sjeli na svoja mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: They entered the plane and sat in their seats.

sentences.translation: Avion je poletio a nebo je bilo vedro.
sentences.translationEn: The plane took off and the sky was clear.
